metadata.name: agent_shield
metadata.description: On-chain guardrails for AI agents on Solana - Permission controls, spending limits, and audit infrastructure for autonomous agents

instructions.name: agent_transfer
docs: Transfer tokens from the vault to an allowed destination.
Only the agent can call this.

accounts.name: tracker
docs: Zero-copy SpendTracker

accounts.name: oracle_registry
docs: Protocol-level oracle registry

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault's PDA-owned token account (source)

accounts.name: token_mint_account
docs: Token mint account for decimals validation

accounts.name: destination_token_account
docs: Destination token account (must be in allowed destinations)

accounts.name: fee_destination_token_account
docs: Developer fee destination token account

accounts.name: protocol_treasury_token_account
docs: Protocol treasury token account

instructions.name: apply_pending_policy
docs: Apply a queued policy update after the timelock expires.

instructions.name: cancel_pending_policy
docs: Cancel a queued policy update.

instructions.name: close_vault
docs: Close the vault entirely. Reclaims rent from all PDAs.

accounts.name: tracker
docs: Zero-copy SpendTracker — close returns rent to owner

instructions.name: deposit_funds
docs: Deposit SPL tokens into the vault's PDA-controlled token account.
Only the owner can call this.

accounts.name: owner_token_account
docs: Owner's token account to transfer from

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault's PDA-controlled token account

instructions.name: finalize_session
docs: Finalize a session after the DeFi action completes.
Revokes delegation, collects fees, closes the SessionAuthority PDA.

accounts.name: session
docs: Session rent is returned to the session's agent (who paid for it).
Seeds include token_mint for per-token concurrent sessions.

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault's PDA token account for the session's token

accounts.name: fee_destination_token_account
docs: Developer fee destination token account

accounts.name: protocol_treasury_token_account
docs: Protocol treasury token account

instructions.name: initialize_oracle_registry
docs: Initialize the protocol-level oracle registry.
Only called once. The authority becomes the registry admin.

instructions.name: initialize_vault
docs: Initialize a new agent vault with policy configuration.
Only the owner can call this. Creates vault PDA, policy PDA,
and zero-copy spend tracker PDA.

accounts.name: tracker
docs: Zero-copy SpendTracker — 2,352 bytes fixed size

instructions.name: queue_policy_update
docs: Queue a policy update when timelock is active.

instructions.name: reactivate_vault
docs: Reactivate a frozen vault. Optionally rotate the agent key.

instructions.name: register_agent
docs: Register an agent's signing key to this vault.
Only the owner can call this. One agent per vault.

instructions.name: revoke_agent
docs: Kill switch. Immediately freezes the vault.
Only the owner can call this.

instructions.name: update_oracle_registry
docs: Add or remove entries from the oracle registry.
Only the registry authority can call this.

instructions.name: update_policy
docs: Update the policy configuration for a vault.
Only the owner can call this. Blocked when timelock > 0.

instructions.name: validate_and_authorize
docs: Core permission check. Called by the agent before a DeFi action.
Validates against policy constraints + oracle registry.
Creates a SessionAuthority PDA, delegates tokens to agent.

accounts.name: tracker
docs: Zero-copy SpendTracker

accounts.name: oracle_registry
docs: Protocol-level oracle registry (shared across all vaults)

accounts.name: session
docs: Ephemeral session PDA — `init` ensures no double-authorization.
Seeds include token_mint for per-token concurrent sessions.

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault's PDA-owned token account for the spend token

accounts.name: token_mint_account
docs: The token mint being spent

instructions.name: withdraw_funds
docs: Withdraw tokens from the vault back to the owner.

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault's PDA-controlled token account

accounts.name: owner_token_account
docs: Owner's token account to receive funds

errors.name: VaultNotActive
errors.msg: Vault is not active

errors.name: UnauthorizedAgent
errors.msg: Unauthorized: signer is not the registered agent

errors.name: UnauthorizedOwner
errors.msg: Unauthorized: signer is not the vault owner

errors.name: TokenNotRegistered
errors.msg: Token not registered in oracle registry

errors.name: ProtocolNotAllowed
errors.msg: Protocol not allowed by policy

errors.name: TransactionTooLarge
errors.msg: Transaction exceeds maximum single transaction size

errors.name: DailyCapExceeded
errors.msg: Daily spending cap would be exceeded

errors.name: LeverageTooHigh
errors.msg: Leverage exceeds maximum allowed

errors.name: TooManyPositions
errors.msg: Maximum concurrent open positions reached

errors.name: PositionOpeningDisallowed
errors.msg: Cannot open new positions (policy disallows)

errors.name: SessionExpired
errors.msg: Session has expired

errors.name: SessionNotAuthorized
errors.msg: Session not authorized

errors.name: InvalidSession
errors.msg: Invalid session: does not belong to this vault

errors.name: OpenPositionsExist
errors.msg: Vault has open positions, cannot close

errors.name: TooManyAllowedProtocols
errors.msg: Policy configuration invalid: too many allowed protocols

errors.name: AgentAlreadyRegistered
errors.msg: Agent already registered for this vault

errors.name: NoAgentRegistered
errors.msg: No agent registered for this vault

errors.name: VaultNotFrozen
errors.msg: Vault is not frozen (expected frozen for reactivation)

errors.name: VaultAlreadyClosed
errors.msg: Vault is already closed

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient vault balance for withdrawal

errors.name: DeveloperFeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Developer fee rate exceeds maximum (500 / 1,000,000 = 5 BPS)

errors.name: InvalidFeeDestination
errors.msg: Fee destination account invalid

errors.name: InvalidProtocolTreasury
errors.msg: Protocol treasury account does not match expected address

errors.name: InvalidAgentKey
errors.msg: Invalid agent: cannot be the zero address

errors.name: AgentIsOwner
errors.msg: Invalid agent: agent cannot be the vault owner

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: DelegationFailed
errors.msg: Token delegation approval failed

errors.name: RevocationFailed
errors.msg: Token delegation revocation failed

errors.name: OracleFeedStale
errors.msg: Oracle feed value is too stale

errors.name: OracleFeedInvalid
errors.msg: Cannot parse oracle feed data

errors.name: TokenSpendBlocked
errors.msg: Unpriced token cannot be spent (receive-only)

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccount
errors.msg: Token account does not belong to vault or has wrong mint

errors.name: OracleAccountMissing
errors.msg: Oracle-priced token requires feed account in remaining_accounts

errors.name: OracleConfidenceTooWide
errors.msg: Oracle price confidence interval too wide

errors.name: OracleUnsupportedType
errors.msg: Oracle account owner is not a recognized oracle program

errors.name: OracleNotVerified
errors.msg: Pyth price update not fully verified by Wormhole

errors.name: TimelockNotExpired
errors.msg: Timelock period has not expired yet

errors.name: TimelockActive
errors.msg: Vault has timelock active — use queue_policy_update instead

errors.name: NoTimelockConfigured
errors.msg: No timelock configured on this vault

errors.name: DestinationNotAllowed
errors.msg: Destination not in allowed list

errors.name: TooManyDestinations
errors.msg: Too many destinations (max 10)

errors.name: InvalidProtocolMode
errors.msg: Invalid protocol mode (must be 0, 1, or 2)

errors.name: OracleRegistryFull
errors.msg: Oracle registry is full (max 105 entries)

errors.name: UnauthorizedRegistryAdmin
errors.msg: Unauthorized: not the oracle registry authority

errors.name: OraclePriceDivergence
errors.msg: Primary and fallback oracle prices diverge beyond threshold

errors.name: OracleBothFeedsFailed
errors.msg: Both primary and fallback oracle feeds failed

types.name: ActionType
docs: Action types that agents can request

fields.name: owner
docs: The owner who created this vault (has full authority)

fields.name: agent
docs: The registered agent's signing key (Pubkey::default() if not yet registered)

fields.name: fee_destination
docs: Developer fee destination — IMMUTABLE after initialization.
Prevents a compromised owner from redirecting fees.

fields.name: vault_id
docs: Unique vault identifier (allows one owner to have multiple vaults)

fields.name: status
docs: Vault status: Active, Frozen, or Closed

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA derivation

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp of vault creation

fields.name: total_transactions
docs: Total number of agent transactions executed through this vault

fields.name: total_volume
docs: Total volume processed in token base units

fields.name: open_positions
docs: Number of currently open positions (for perps tracking)

fields.name: total_fees_collected
docs: Cumulative developer fees collected from this vault (token base units)

types.name: EpochBucket
docs: A single epoch bucket tracking aggregate USD spend.
16 bytes per bucket. USD-only — rate limiting stays client-side.

fields.name: epoch_id
docs: Epoch identifier: unix_timestamp / EPOCH_DURATION

fields.name: usd_amount
docs: Aggregate USD spent in this epoch (6 decimals)

types.name: OracleEntry
docs: Individual entry mapping a token mint to its oracle feed.

fields.name: mint
docs: SPL token mint address

fields.name: oracle_feed
docs: Pyth or Switchboard oracle feed account.
Ignored when is_stablecoin is true.

fields.name: is_stablecoin
docs: If true, token is 1:1 USD (no oracle read needed)

fields.name: fallback_feed
docs: Optional fallback oracle feed. Pubkey::default() = no fallback.
Used when primary is stale/invalid. Cross-checked for divergence
when both are available.

types.name: OracleRegistry
docs: Protocol-level oracle registry — maps token mints to oracle feeds.
Maintained by protocol admin. Shared across ALL vaults.
Any vault can use any registered token without per-vault configuration.
Seeds: `[b"oracle_registry"]`

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority who can add/remove entries (upgradeable to multisig/DAO)

fields.name: entries
docs: Token mint → oracle feed mappings

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

types.name: PendingPolicyUpdate
docs: Queued policy update that becomes executable after a timelock period.
Created by `queue_policy_update`, applied by `apply_pending_policy`,
or cancelled by `cancel_pending_policy`.
PDA seeds: `[b"pending_policy", vault.key().as_ref()]`

fields.name: vault
docs: Associated vault pubkey

fields.name: queued_at
docs: Unix timestamp when this update was queued

fields.name: executes_at
docs: Unix timestamp when this update becomes executable

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

fields.name: vault
docs: Associated vault pubkey

fields.name: daily_spending_cap_usd
docs: Maximum aggregate spend per rolling 24h period in USD (6 decimals).
$500 = 500_000_000. This is the primary spending cap.

fields.name: max_transaction_size_usd
docs: Maximum single transaction size in USD (6 decimals).

fields.name: protocol_mode
docs: Protocol access control mode:
0 = all allowed (protocols list ignored)
1 = allowlist (only protocols in list)
2 = denylist (all except protocols in list)

fields.name: protocols
docs: Protocol pubkeys for allowlist/denylist.
Bounded to MAX_ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS entries.

fields.name: max_leverage_bps
docs: Maximum leverage multiplier in basis points (e.g., 10000 = 100x)
Set to 0 to disallow leveraged positions entirely

fields.name: can_open_positions
docs: Whether the agent can open new positions (vs only close existing)

fields.name: max_concurrent_positions
docs: Maximum number of concurrent open positions

fields.name: developer_fee_rate
docs: Developer fee rate (rate / 1,000,000). Applied to every finalized
transaction. Max MAX_DEVELOPER_FEE_RATE (500 = 5 BPS).

fields.name: timelock_duration
docs: Timelock duration in seconds for policy changes. 0 = no timelock.

fields.name: allowed_destinations
docs: Allowed destination addresses for agent transfers.
Empty = any destination allowed. Bounded to MAX_ALLOWED_DESTINATIONS.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

fields.name: vault
docs: Associated vault

fields.name: agent
docs: The agent who initiated this session

fields.name: authorized
docs: Whether this session has been authorized by the permission check

fields.name: authorized_amount
docs: Authorized action details (for verification in finalize)

fields.name: action_type
docs: The action type that was authorized (stored so finalize can record it)

fields.name: expires_at_slot
docs: Slot-based expiry: session is valid until this slot

fields.name: delegated
docs: Whether token delegation was set up (approve CPI)

fields.name: delegation_token_account
docs: The vault's token account that was delegated to the agent
(only meaningful when delegated == true)

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

types.name: SpendTracker
docs: Zero-copy 144-epoch circular buffer for rolling 24h USD spend tracking.
Each bucket covers a 10-minute epoch. Boundary correction ensures
functionally exact accuracy (~$0.000001 worst-case rounding).
Rounding direction: slightly permissive (under-counts by at most $0.000001).
Seeds: `[b"tracker", vault.key().as_ref()]`

fields.name: vault
docs: Associated vault pubkey

fields.name: buckets
docs: 144 epoch buckets for rolling 24h spend tracking

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

fields.name: _padding
docs: Padding for 8-byte alignment

types.name: VaultStatus
docs: Vault status enum
